sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section V, List of Answers on Terminology 8:1

items.sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section V, List of Answers on Terminology 8:1
items.html: If there are two distances without light between the vessel of Hesed and Keter, meaning when HB are empty of light, the illumination of GAR is denied of the Partzuf. (Item 40)
